## GDS Holdings Audit Committee Reshuffle Raises Governance and Oversight Questions

Audit committee instability at a Chinese-domiciled operator warrants elevated vigilance — governance deterioration has historically been an early signal of deeper issues at China-listed names, and GDS already carries elevated scrutiny given its domicile.

- Simply Wall St. flags an audit committee shake-up at GDS, a China-based data center operator
- Framed explicitly as a governance and risk oversight concern, not a routine rotation
- No specific departures, replacements, or triggering event named in the headline
- Medium classifier confidence given the significance of audit committee stability for a China-domiciled, US-listed company
